TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Mabanan == u sulit nu Hulam śįłŚģČťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Miaoli a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Mabanan. u kasalumaluma' nu Mabanan sa, 87 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 235 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 221 ku tademaw, pakalatu 94%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 14 ku tademaw, pakalatu 6%. u kasabinacadan, Tayan(Tayal) 92%, Paywan(Paiwan) 1%. u Tayan a niyazu' u Tayan a niyazu' kuyni, katuud ku Tayan a tademaw itini. u zuma a tademaw sa u Pangcah, u Yuwatan, u Taluku, inayi' tu ku zuma a cidakay itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. u cidekay nu Taywan Incumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah, saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah. tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 4 a bulad pulung sausi (561,327), Pangcah (209,430), Tayan (90,059), Paywan (100,689), Yuwatan (58,390), Rukay (13,314), Puyuma (14,140), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,607), Yami (4,606), Saw (785), Kabalan (1,465), Taluku (31,501), Sakizaya (929), Sejek (9,992), Laaluwa (399), Kanakanabu (334), zuma (12,052)
S.PHON: == mabanan == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam **** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i miaor~…ĺi a kuwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu mabanan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu mabanan sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) **%, pajwan(paiwan) *%. u tajan a nijazu Ē~ ° u tajan a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, katuud ku tajan a tad…ômaw itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u paŇč ¶ańß, u juwatan, u tar~…ĺuku, inaji Ē~ ° tu ku zuma a ¶idakaj itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan in ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß, saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß. tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
S.FORM: == Mabanan == u sulit nu Hulam śįłŚģČťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Miaoli a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Mabanan. u kasalumaluma' nu Mabanan sa, 87 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 235 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 221 ku tademaw, pakalatu 94%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 14 ku tademaw, pakalatu 6%. u kasabinacadan, Tayan(Tayal) 92%, Paywan(Paiwan) 1%. u Tayan a niyazu' u Tayan a niyazu' kuyni, katuud ku Tayan a tademaw itini. u zuma a tademaw sa u Pangcah, u Yuwatan, u Taluku, inayi' tu ku zuma a cidakay itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. u cidekay nu Taywan Incumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah, saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah. tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 4 a bulad pulung sausi (561,327), Pangcah (209,430), Tayan (90,059), Paywan (100,689), Yuwatan (58,390), Rukay (13,314), Puyuma (14,140), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,607), Yami (4,606), Saw (785), Kabalan (1,465), Taluku (31,501), Sakizaya (929), Sejek (9,992), Laaluwa (399), Kanakanabu (334), zuma (12,052)
S.PHON: == mabanan == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam **** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i miaor~…ĺi a kuwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu mabanan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu mabanan sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) **%, pajwan(paiwan) *%. u tajan a nijazu Ē~ ° u tajan a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, katuud ku tajan a tad…ômaw itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u paŇč ¶ańß, u juwatan, u tar~…ĺuku, inaji Ē~ ° tu ku zuma a ¶idakaj itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan in ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß, saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß. tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***),
